title: Agent Review File
description: Schema for AI-generated code review comments displayed by the agent-reviews VSCode extension.

$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema reference for IDE autocomplete.

author.description: Default author for all comments. Individual comments can override this.

summary.description: Review summary with verdict and overview.

verdict.description: Review verdict. APPROVE: ready to merge. REQUEST_CHANGES: has blocking/important issues. COMMENT: observations without a strong stance.

overview.description: One-paragraph summary of the review findings.

strengths.description: List of positive aspects noted in the code. Can be empty.

comments.description: Array of inline review comments attached to specific file:line locations.

Severity.description: Comment severity level. blocking: must fix. important: should fix. suggestion: consider alternative. nit: minor/style. praise: positive feedback. learning: educational context.

ReviewAuthor.description: Author information displayed in comment headers.

name.description: Display name shown in the comment header.

iconUrl.description: URL to an avatar image displayed next to the author name.

ReviewComment.description: A single review comment attached to a file and line number.

path.description: File path relative to the repository root, matching the path shown in the PR diff.

line.description: 1-based line number where the comment is anchored.

side.description: RIGHT for new/added code (most common). LEFT for commenting on deleted lines.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the comment was created.

author.description: Per-comment author override. Falls back to the top-level author if omitted.
